ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region to which the country belongs */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "government_spending_on_education" REAL /* Percentage of GDP spent on education */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "start_age" INTEGER /* Age at which education typically starts for this level */,
  "end_age" INTEGER /* Age at which education typically ends for this level */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the education level in years */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the education level data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Primary data source for the indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country to which the dataset belongs */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level to which the dataset belongs */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator to which the dataset belongs */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for the given year */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the dataset */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which the data source belongs */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person at the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation check */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which the validation check belongs */,
  "validation_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation check */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation check */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation check */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the validation information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, educator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level to which the statistic belongs */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator to which the statistic belongs */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., mean, median, mode) */,
  "stat_period" TEXT /* Period over which the statistic is calculated (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_stats_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_stats_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level to which the visualization belongs */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator to which the visualization belongs */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_url" TEXT /* URL of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level to which the report belongs */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator to which the report belongs */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the audit trail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
